_note: User sent a file (PDF, Word, Excel, etc.). All metadata is inline — no secondary API call needed for metadata. Download content via GET /v2/bot/message/{messageId}/content using the channel access token. File messages can only be sent in 1-on-1 chats; they do not appear in group/room contexts. Content on LINE servers expires after an undisclosed period — download promptly. 'quoteToken' and 'contentProvider' are NOT present on file message objects.
